step.name: define-modality
step.action: Pick voice / text / hybrid; document latency budget.

step.name: choose-providers
step.action: Select ASR + LLM + TTS providers; pin versions.

step.name: wire-safety
step.action: Insert jailbreak + grounding filters; define refusal templates.

step.name: instrument-audit
step.action: Wire JSONL audit log with user + LLM + safety + latency per turn.

step.name: budget-rehearsal
step.action: Run 100 sample dialogues; verify latency p95 within budget.
